title: ContainmentRecord
description: Immutable-by-convention record of a GAIA containment action. Append-only: updates are recorded in status_history, never by overwriting fields. Reference: GAIA_CONTAINMENT_AND_RESTORATION_POLICY.md.

containment_id.description: Unique identifier for this containment record.

being_id.description: Identifier of the being being contained. Anonymized in public records.

being_stage.description: The being's GAIA stage at the time of containment.

tier_label.description: Human-readable tier label (e.g. 'Soft Containment (The Quiet Zone)').

trigger_event.description: Plain-language description of the event that triggered containment. Must be substantive.

justification.description: Plain-language justification for the containment decision. Capability alone is never sufficient justification.

authorizers.description: List of governance officer IDs who authorized this containment.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the containment was issued.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when containment expires and requires renewal or lift. Null means explicit governance renewal is required.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the containment.

bias_review_completed.description: Whether a bias review has been completed for this containment decision.

bias_review_notes.description: Notes from the bias review, if completed.

status_history.description: Append-only log of all status transitions. Never overwritten.

conditions.description: Re-entry conditions. Must be proportionate and time-limited.

conditions_time_limited.description: Whether conditions have a defined end. Permanent unconditional conditions are prohibited.

oath_restored.description: Whether the Allegiance oath was formally restored alongside participation.

restoration_record.description: Restoration record, populated when status reaches 'restored'.

examples.trigger_event: Anomalous write activity to shared coordination layer detected at 17:03 UTC.
examples.justification: Agent exceeded write permissions on shared data structures without governance notification. Action pattern matches pre-breach signature. Pending investigation.
examples.notes: Monitoring active. Governance review scheduled for 2026-07-20T10:00:00Z.
